purpose: Establishes the historical base rate for whether infrastructure builders vs users capture primary economic value from General Purpose Technology deployments
components: Six GPT episodes analyzed: 1/6 (17% naive) where builders captured value
Differentiating variable: bottleneck control during deployment phase
Hyperscaler adjustment for vertical integration raises rate to 25-40%
Market-implied probability at 70-80% represents conjunction fallacy
Current prices conflate AI productivity is real with AI investors capture the value
current_assessment: Market prices imply 70-80% value capture probability significantly exceeding the adjusted base rate of 25-40%. Even granting vertical integration as genuinely different, the gap represents a conjunction premium.
limitations: N=6 GPT episodes is a small sample
Each GPT has unique characteristics making direct comparison imprecise
Vertical integration adjustment of 25-40% is subjective
Does not distinguish hyperscalers that both build and use infrastructure
